style_effects: Molten lava cracks radiate intense orange heat shimmer across Nidoking's body, with ember sparks spiraling upward in a slow, fiery dance. A crackling crimson aura pulses around its form, casting warm amber light that casts dancing shadows, while smoke trails curl lazily from its limbs as it moves. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
